info.name: Cart API - JWT Complete Tests (50+ Cases)
info.description: Comprehensive JWT-protected test suite with 50+ test cases

exec: pm.test('✅ User registered & token saved', () => pm.response.to.have.status(201));

item.name: Test 4 - Create User Invalid Email Format
Test 8 - Create User Empty First Name

exec: pm.test("Error about name or required fields", function () {

item.name: Test 12 - Create User Invalid Field Type

exec: pm.test('Product ID saved', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.data).to.have.property('id'); pm.collectionVariables.set('productId', jsonData.data.id); });
pm.test('Error about required fields', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include('required'); });
pm.test('Error about stock', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include('Stock quantity must be greater than 0'); });
pm.test('Error about price', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include('Price'); });

item.name: Test 19 - Create Product Stock Exceeds Max

exec: pm.test('Error about exceeding maximum', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include('exceeds maximum'); });

item.name: Test 20 - Create Product Price Exceeds Max

exec: pm.test('Error about price exceeding', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include('Price exceeds'); });
pm.test('Error about status', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include('status'); });

item.name: Test 22 - Create Product Name Too Long

exec: pm.test('Error about name length', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include('name'); });
pm.test('Products array returned', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.data).to.be.an('array'); });

item.name: Test 25 - Get Products With Status Filter
Test 26 - Get Products Invalid Status Filter

exec: pm.test('Cart ID saved', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.data).to.have.property('id'); pm.collectionVariables.set('cartId', jsonData.data.id); });

Test 37 - Add Item Missing Product ID

exec: pm.test('Error about product ID', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include('Product ID exceeds'); });

exec: pm.test('Error about quantity', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include('Quantity exceeds'); });

exec: pm.test('Cart not found', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include('Cart not found'); });

item.name: Test 46 - Add Item Product Not Found

exec: pm.test('Product not found', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include('Product not found'); });

item.name: 5. 5. Remove Item & Checkout & Delete (8 tests) (JWT Protected)
Test 47 - Remove Item from Cart Success

exec: pm.test('Item removed successfully', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.success).to.eql(true); });

item.name: Test 48 - Remove Item Product ID Exceeds Max

exec: pm.test('Error about product ID', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include('Product ID exceeds'); });

item.name: Test 49 - Add Item Again for Checkout

exec: pm.test('Checkout completed', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include('Checkout completed'); });

item.name: Test 51 - Checkout Cart ID Exceeds Max

exec: pm.test('Error about cart ID', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include('Cart ID exceeds'); });
pm.test('Cart deleted successfully', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.success).to.eql(true); });

item.name: Test 53 - Delete Cart ID Exceeds Max

exec: pm.test('Error about cart ID', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include('Cart ID exceeds'); });
pm.test('Cart not found', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.message).to.include('Cart not found'); });
